name: 格洛克18型 | 粉红 DDPAT
nameZh: 格洛克18型 | 粉红 DDPAT
descriptionEn: The Glock 18 is a serviceable first-round pistol that works best against unarmored opponents and is capable of firing three-round bursts. It has been painted using a Digital Disruptive Pattern (DDPAT) hydrographic. By the time you're close enough to notice the pixels it's already too late
descriptionZh: 格洛克18型是把耐用的第一回合手枪，非常适合对付那些没有穿护甲的对手，并且可以进行三连发爆炸开火。 这把武器使用数字迷彩（DDPAT）图案的花纹进行了涂装。 当你能注意到像素图案的时候，已经为时已晚了
